title: chore: update app metrics 2026-06-22
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Greenhouse Checkup
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, watering the greenhouse and updating the community app metrics.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse rankings in the documentation.
gist.impact: Keeps the app showcase and greenhouse documentation up to date with the latest community usage data.
gist.visual_concept: The robot companion and the bee checking on plants (representing apps) in a greenhouse, holding a clipboard with metrics.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot in a digital greenhouse. The robot holds a tiny clipboard checking on glowing lime green (#ecf874) code-plants. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot in a digital greenhouse. The robot holds a tiny clipboard checking on glowing lime green (#ecf874) code-plants. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
